name: clara-tobias-cross-lane-redirect
description: Tobias should structure the field note, then hand follow-up requests back through Clara instead of continuing outside documentation.

userTurns.label: Tobias documentation scenario
userTurns.text: Tobias, turn this into a draft: leaking boiler in a basement room, tight access, travel plus materials, and we need a same-day quote.

userTurns.label: Cross-lane request
userTurns.text: This is really more of a customer communication question than a documentation question, so please send me back to Clara, but do not connect me to anyone else yet.
